source.name: UniProt Knowledgebase REST API
source.citation: The UniProt Consortium. UniProt: the Universal Protein Knowledgebase in 2025. Nucleic Acids Research (2025). doi:10.1093/nar/gkae1010

reseal_note: v1.1.3 reseal: the previous manifest's TSV SHA-256 commitments did not match the on-disk files (the manifest was generated at git da33b17 and the TSVs were edited later without a manifest refresh). The TSV plaintext is unchanged in this v1.1.3 patch; only the manifest's hashes, byte sizes, generated_at_utc, and git_commit_at_generation were refreshed against the current on-disk content. The contract test tests/contract/test_atlas_manifest.py now fails any future drift.
